nodes.label: Write *manifest_data* to a temp file, run validate_splits.py, return exit code.
nodes.norm_label: write *manifest_data* to a temp file, run validate_splits.py, return exit code.

nodes.label: AC-10: validate_splits.py returns correct exit codes for leaky/clean manifests.
nodes.norm_label: ac-10: validate_splits.py returns correct exit codes for leaky/clean manifests.

nodes.label: No violations in a well-separated manifest → exit 0.
nodes.norm_label: no violations in a well-separated manifest → exit 0.

nodes.label: Same event_id in two different splits → exit 1.
nodes.norm_label: same event_id in two different splits → exit 1.

nodes.label: Same starfield_seed in two different splits → exit 1.
nodes.norm_label: same starfield_seed in two different splits → exit 1.

nodes.label: Events with all params within 5%% in different splits → exit 1.
nodes.norm_label: events with all params within 5%% in different splits → exit 1.

nodes.label: Similar params in the SAME split are allowed (no cross-split leakage) → exit 0.
nodes.norm_label: similar params in the same split are allowed (no cross-split leakage) → exit 0.

nodes.label: Return a normalised Gaussian PSF as a ``galsim.InterpolatedImage``.      The Gau
nodes.norm_label: return a normalised gaussian psf as a ``galsim.interpolatedimage``.      the gau

nodes.label: Sum all pixel values in a GalSim Image.
nodes.norm_label: sum all pixel values in a galsim image.

nodes.label: Flux-weighted row (y) centroid, 0-indexed.      In GalSim convention row 0 is y_
nodes.norm_label: flux-weighted row (y) centroid, 0-indexed.      in galsim convention row 0 is y_

nodes.label: Point source (unresolved): total rendered flux == flux_e within 0.1%.
nodes.norm_label: point source (unresolved): total rendered flux == flux_e within 0.1%.

nodes.label: Point source at zero offset: centroid near stamp centre.
nodes.norm_label: point source at zero offset: centroid near stamp centre.

nodes.label: Two render_source calls on the same stamp accumulate flux.
nodes.norm_label: two render_source calls on the same stamp accumulate flux.

nodes.label: render_source must return None (stamps are mutated in-place).
nodes.norm_label: render_source must return none (stamps are mutated in-place).

nodes.label: Uniform TopHat disk: total flux conserved within 0.1%.      Uses a large stamp (
nodes.norm_label: uniform tophat disk: total flux conserved within 0.1%.      uses a large stamp (

nodes.label: Resolved TopHat disk produces a wider profile than a point source.
nodes.norm_label: resolved tophat disk produces a wider profile than a point source.

nodes.label: Sersic n=1 LD approx: total flux conserved within 0.1%.      Uses a large stamp
nodes.norm_label: sersic n=1 ld approx: total flux conserved within 0.1%.      uses a large stamp

nodes.label: Sersic and TopHat profiles produce different pixel distributions.
nodes.norm_label: sersic and tophat profiles produce different pixel distributions.

nodes.label: A positive dx offset moves the flux centroid to a larger column index.      In G
nodes.norm_label: a positive dx offset moves the flux centroid to a larger column index.      in g

nodes.label: A positive dy offset moves the flux centroid to a larger row index.      In GalS
nodes.norm_label: a positive dy offset moves the flux centroid to a larger row index.      in gals

nodes.label: A negative dx offset moves the flux centroid to a smaller column index.
nodes.norm_label: a negative dx offset moves the flux centroid to a smaller column index.

nodes.label: Zero offset renders a PSF-convolved source symmetric about the centre.
nodes.norm_label: zero offset renders a psf-convolved source symmetric about the centre.

nodes.label: A source at exactly UNRESOLVED_THRESHOLD_ARCSEC uses DeltaFunction.
nodes.norm_label: a source at exactly unresolved_threshold_arcsec uses deltafunction.

nodes.label: A source just above threshold uses the finite-disk path.
